response: Lisa’s March onboarding feedback email details the cohort’s 7.2/10 satisfaction score (a drop from the prior cohort’s 8.1), highlighting standout positives in the buddy system (9.1/10) and timely IT setup, while noting key issues: 5 out of 8 cohort members confused about benefits deadlines, tools access taking 3–5 days (versus the 1-day target), and no received culture handbooks. The explicit top-priority action item outlined in the feedback is resolving the delayed tools access problem for onboarding cohorts.
